sections.heading: Secs. 17b-550 to 17b-554. (Formerly Secs. 17a-390 to 17a-394). Definitions. Eligibility. Limitation of charges; civil penalty; regulations. Posting of policy relating to Medicare payments and processing. Regulations.

body: Sections 17b-550 to 17b-554 , inclusive, are repealed, effective June 12, 2023.
content.plainText: Sections 17b-550 to 17b-554 , inclusive, are repealed, effective June 12, 2023.

body: Note: Chapters 319kk and 319 ll are also reserved for future use.
content.plainText:
Reserved for future use.

Note: Chapters 319kk and 319 ll are also reserved for future use.

body: Secs. 17b-550 to 17b-554. (Formerly Secs. 17a-390 to 17a-394). Definitions. Eligibility. Limitation of charges; civil penalty; regulations.
